findings.title: Missing from_address validation
findings.description: Handler does not validate that from_address == registered L1 bridge. Any Ethereum address can call this handler.

findings.title: Unrestricted message cancellation
findings.description: startL1ToL2MessageCancellation without access control. Anyone can cancel pending messages after L2 processing.
